rationale: The two papers are tightly aligned in topic and level of analysis: both study cookie-level Internet/banner display advertising effectiveness, with the cited 2006 paper modeling effects on actual purchasing and the citing 2015 paper estimating causal stage-specific effects in a randomized field experiment. The citing note explicitly states it "extends prior online display advertising research," making the cited work a plausible foundational/comparison source rather than an incidental mention. With this overlap and a confirmed DOI match, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
